mapper.sql: w.id, w.wo_number, w.lot_id, w.equipment_id, w.process_type, w.status, w.target_qty, w.actual_qty, w.planned_start, w.actual_start, w.actual_end, l.lot_number, l.product_name, e.eq_code, e.eq_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM work_orders w LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = w.lot_id LEFT JOIN equipment e ON e.id = w.equipment_id ORDER BY w.planned_start DESC, w.wo_number ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT FROM work_orders w LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = w.lot_id LEFT JOIN equipment e ON e.id = w.equipment_id WHERE w.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM work_orders w LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = w.lot_id LEFT JOIN equipment e ON e.id = w.equipment_id WHERE w.wo_number = #{woNumber}

SELECT a.id, a.work_order_id, w.wo_number, a.user_id, u.name AS user_name, a.role, a.start_at, a.end_at FROM work_assignments a LEFT JOIN work_orders w ON w.id = a.work_order_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_orders ( id, wo_number, lot_id, equipment_id, process_type, status, target_qty, actual_qty, planned_start, actual_start, actual_end ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{woNumber}, #{lotId}, #{equipmentId}, #{processType}, #{status}, #{targetQty}, #{actualQty}, #{plannedStart}, #{actualStart}, #{actualEnd} )
mapper.update: UPDATE work_orders SET wo_number = #{woNumber}, lot_id = #{lotId}, equipment_id = #{equipmentId}, process_type = #{processType}, status = #{status}, target_qty = #{targetQty}, actual_qty = #{actualQty}, planned_start = #{plannedStart}, actual_start = #{actualStart}, actual_end = #{actualEnd} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_assignments ( id, work_order_id, user_id, role, start_at, end_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{workOrderId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{startAt}, #{endAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE work_assignments SET work_order_id = #{workOrderId}, user_id = #{userId}, role = #{role}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt} WHERE id = #{id}
